For S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Defend the Batch Partial Failure model · Theory Batch Partial Failure, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: One successful batch HTTP response means every requested object changed. Type annotations, generated SDK shapes, and resolved promises do not strengthen that runtime claim.
